name: policylens
description: AI-assisted driver license OCR, validation, and data quality dashboard.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @policylens/domain && npm run build --workspace @policylens/api && npm run build --workspace @policylens/web && npm run build --workspace @policylens/cdk && npm run build --workspace @policylens/harness
scripts.test: npm run check:architecture && npm run build --workspace @policylens/domain && vitest run
scripts.verify: npm run check:architecture && npm run build && npm test && npm run harness && npm run cdk:synth
